agentMessage.description: Brief acknowledgment + next questions (under 300 words). Markdown allowed.

sectionsUpdated.description: Map of section_id → extracted fields from the user's reply. Empty in revision mode.

sectionsCovered.description: CUMULATIVE list of section IDs with sufficient information. Include every section ever covered, not just the latest turn's update.

readyToGenerate.description: True only when ALL seven discovery sections are covered.

readyToRevise.description: Set to true ONLY when the user has just confirmed a previously-proposed revision plan in post-completion chat. Triggers automatic Blueprint regeneration on the frontend.
